role: Research Collaboration on Scene Graph Generation and Visual Relation Detection
title: In collaboration with LMU Munich
desc: I am collaborating with Prof. Volker Tresp and Sahand Sharifzadeh on the research topic of Scene Graph Generation and Visual Relation Detection.

role: Research Experience on Transfer Learning and Vehicle Recognition
title: Iran's Traffic Department
desc: I conducted a research project with a comparative approach aimed to determine the robustness of training deep neural networks on a noisy dataset using the transfer learning technique. The proposed method was applied in a vehicle recognition scenario and resulted in a journal publication.

role: Research Experience on Deep Depth Colorization
title: Sapienza University of Rome
desc: I contributed to the early research on 'Depth Colorization' where we proposed a deep learning approach of normalizing and mapping the depth images into three channels in order to improve the recognition accuracy of RGB-D images (Nov. 2016 - Mar. 2017). I Also assisted in the preparation phase of a synthetic depth dataset called 'VANDAL' which is used to train ConvNets (Feb. 2016 - Apr. 2016).

title: Different Companies
desc: I developed a RESTful application for Avasamaneh company, and an Android application for management purposes.

title: ATSYS Electrical/Electronic Manufacturing Company
desc: I developed several modules using Java programming language for the Company’s Content Management System. Furthermore, I assisted in configuring the network’s infrastructure. It was a part of my training course which I passed during my bachelor’s degree.

title: Different Companies
desc: I developed an application for statistical purposes for Pangan Avaran company which was written in C#. In addition, I developed a CMS Android application for a website called Armandownload.
